name: diskencrypt
description: Module to enable Azure Disk encryption with storing of keys in Azure KeyVault. Azure Disk Encryption (ADE) is a capability that helps you encrypt your Windows and Linux IaaS virtual machine disks. ADE leverages the industry standard BitLocker feature of Windows and the DM-Crypt feature of Linux to provide volume encryption for the OS and data disks. The solution is integrated with Azure Key Vault to help you control and manage the disk-encryption keys and secrets. The solution also ensures that all data on the virtual machine disks are encrypted at rest in your Azure storage.
